# edgenext Provider





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) EdgeNext API key for authentication
- `endpoint` (String) EdgeNext API endpoint address
- `secret` (String, Sensitive) EdgeNext secret key for authentication

### Optional

- `retry_count` (Number) Number of API request retries
- `timeout` (Number) API request timeout in seconds
